description:
Didn't see ya there! Care to frolic with me through the streets of Hanoi? We're talking motorbikes, street Phở, the iconic train street, a day in Hạ Long Bay, puppy time, and so much more 🇻🇳

My Instagram→ https://www.instagram.com/taykbell/
Join my newsletter! 🗞️ → https://forms.gle/wNHxBpKmFEn4TKT17

Subscribe for $0 and don't forget to INCINERATE the like button, I'll love you forever. 

👥 Follow me on LinkedIn: https://tinyurl.com/5n6ddrnv
TikTok I guess: https://tinyurl.com/a2k9vxmd

0:00 Let's go to Vietnam
0:54 Hidden gem coffee shop
1:49 Street food
3:42 Night life & noodles
4:17 Exploring Hanoi
6:16 Train Street 👀 
7:51 Puppy time
8:47 Hanoi vs NYC
9:12 Anthony Bourdain x Obama Bún chả
10:37 Hạ Long Bay
13:48 Important bloopers

✨ Equipment I use for filming ✨
➢ My camera (aka my phone): iPhone 15 Pro Max
➢ Rode Wireless Go II mic system: https://amzn.to/3Le5RMV
➢ Mini clip-on lavalier mic: https://amzn.to/3LhZyI3
➢ Mic for sit-downs: https://amzn.to/3prIXGU
➢ Softbox lighting kit for sit-downs: https://amzn.to/3MxJyWh
➢ iPhone hand-held vlogging gimble: https://amzn.to/3pzDT36
➢ Noise Canceling Headphones: https://amzn.to/3bmx4Nt
➢ Ring Light for tripod: https://amzn.to/2ZtGO2L

🎵 Music
➢ Epidemic Sound → use link for FREE trial https://www.epidemicsound.com/referral/lv6f1q
➢ iSaintJames  @isaintjames  → https://soundcloud.com/isaintjames

💪🏼 For workout classes: Sign up for Class Pass with my referral code (we both get credits!) https://classpass.com/refer/PEEA1TMA29

🎧 Follow me on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/user/iamteebell?si=99ab8ae2a05c487a
